svg.title: OAuth 2.1 Authorization Code Flow with PKCE
svg.desc: Sequence diagram showing OAuth 2.1 flow between Client, Authorization Server, and Resource Server with PKCE challenge, authorization code exchange, and token-protected API access.
svg.text: OAuth 2.1 mandates: PKCE for all clients · no implicit grant · no password grant
refresh token rotation · HTTPS everywhere · exact redirect URI matching
